{{Relic Infobox|Strike Dummy???|2}}{{R|Strike Dummy???||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} from the [[Slay the Spire 2:Merchant???|Merchant???]]. It is a weaker version of {{R|Strike Dummy||2}}. It increases the damage dealt by all cards with 'Strike' in their name by 1.

== Sources ==
Can be bought from the [[Slay the Spire 2:Merchant???|Merchant???]]. Also can be obtained upon defeating the [[Slay the Spire 2:Merchant???|Merchant???]] in combat.
